message:
🐛 Fix scroll position Pin behavior and default to unpinned (#290)

Three bugs fixed in useLastRoute scroll position management:

1. Pin ON + scroll to top never saved: the scrollTop <= 0 guard
   prevented saving position 0, so old scroll positions persisted
   forever. Now clears the saved entry when at top.

2. Pin OFF still scrolled down: navigation scroll-to-top triggered
   the scroll listener which could interfere. Now sets isRestoringRef
   during programmatic scroll-to-top to suppress the listener.

3. Default Pin was ON: all dashboards auto-restored old positions.
   Changed default to OFF so pages scroll to top on navigation.
   Users can toggle Pin on per-dashboard to preserve position.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
